visual_summary: A popover component is a dropdown menu that appears when a user interacts with a trigger. Developers can use popovers for providing additional information, displaying quick actions, or offering feedback forms.
generation_prompt:
Create a production-ready popover component with the following characteristics:

Name: popover-demo
Description: A popover component is a dropdown menu that appears when a user interacts with a trigger. Developers can use popovers for providing additional information, displaying quick actions, or offering feedback forms.
Style: e.g. minimal
Interactions: e.g. hover
Tags: popover, dropdown, menu, feedback, actions

Requirements:
- Works in React with TypeScript by default but adaptable to Vue, Svelte, or plain HTML/CSS
- Uses Tailwind CSS for styling
- Fully accessible with ARIA labels and keyboard navigation
- Responsive and mobile-friendly
- No external dependencies beyond React and Tailwind unless necessary
- Include all necessary imports
- Export as default with sensible prop types

Generate clean production-ready code only. No explanations.
Reference implementation (adapt don't copy):
// registry/default/example/popover-demo.tsx
"use client"

import React from "react"
import { Image as ImageIcon, Paintbrush, Plus } from "lucide-react"

  PopoverRoot,
  PopoverSubmitButton,
  PopoverTextarea,
  PopoverTrigger,
} from "../ui/popover"
